description: Product Description Find out your Hogwarts House with the talking Wizarding World Sorting Hat! With 15 phrases, authentic details and full facial movements, the Sorting Hat is the perfect way for young witches, wizards, and Muggles to recreate the iconic first-year Sorting Ceremony scene from Harry Potter. Place the hat on your head and the Sorting Hat will automatically respond! Its eyebrows, head and mouth will move as it determines and announces the Hogwarts House for the wearer. Will it pick Gryffindor, Ravenclaw, Hufflepuff or Slytherin? Press the button on the brim of the Sorting Hat to hear more phrases. Once your House is revealed, use your imagination to create your own Wizarding World adventures with the Harry Potter Wands (each sold separately)! This enchanting Sorting Hat makes a great gift for kids ages 5 and up. 3 AA Duracell batteries included. The Sorting Hat Speaks English and French – simply slide the switch to choose your preferred language. Bring home the Wizarding World Sorting Hat and discover your Hogwarts House!
